G0.label:
case zero.succ
α : Type u_1
a : α
n✝ : Nat
a✝ : (fun n => replicate n a) 0 = (fun n => replicate n a) n✝ → 0 = n✝
⊢ (fun n => replicate n a) 0 = (fun n => replicate n a) (n✝ + 1) → 0 = n✝ + 1

G1.label:
α : Type u_1
a : α
n : Nat
a_1 : (fun n => replicate n a) 0 = (fun n => replicate n a) n → 0 = n
⊢ (fun n => replicate n a) 0 = (fun n => replicate n a) (n + 1) → 0 = n + 1
